shape_decode: cmp,vp,vpc,naive = _,W,_,L : value_profile RESOLVES, naive BLOCKS, cmplog & value_profile_cmplog non-decisive. Pure VP-PRO (CMP_MAP distance-bucket gradient) family - VP's feedback is necessary and sufficient; I2S substitution (cmplog) is non-decisive.
decidable_reason: PARTIAL (unchanged from round 2; re-examined and re-affirmed 2026-06-18). One hypothesis stands: vp_basin_escape validated 3 sB branches (bloaty_147, lcms_2147, lcms_2417) via the canonical value_distance fallback and is carried forward verbatim under the monotonic-superset invariant. The 8 UNLABELED branches (bloaty/11, bloaty/150, libxml2/6325_h1, libxml2/6655, harfbuzz/5708_h0, harfbuzz/6006, harfbuzz/6061_h1, sqlite3/14793) remain honestly decidable:false: this round re-checked the two built tools the prior rounds had NOT tried here (depth_reach, joint_necessity/token_count) and confirmed neither yields a G1-discriminating, G2-independent signal for them. The VP advantage in this shape is a SEARCH-TRAJECTORY property (VP's CMP_MAP retains near-miss intermediates that naive discards); the terminal resolving/blocking seed sets contain no fingerprint of that gradient distinct from the circular fact that a resolving seed already contains/reaches the answer.

hypotheses.label: VP CMP_MAP steers AWAY from a dominant magic-value basin: there is no single target literal - the true side wants ANY value but the corpus-dominant magic. VP-resolving seeds DEPART the basin (multi-modal: spread over several non-magic format magics), while naive-blocking seeds are pinned at the basin value.

metric_definitions.naive_basin_lock_fraction: fraction of naive-BLOCKING seeds whose 4-byte prefix == the corpus-dominant magic (00 61 73 6d).
metric_definitions.vp_value_modality: count of DISTINCT non-magic 4-byte prefix values across the vp-resolving seed set (multi-modality test - a single-target gradient would be ~uni-modal at one constant; basin escape is multi-modal).
metric_definitions.basin_departure_lift: naive_basin_lock_fraction - vp_basin_lock_fraction (positive => VP escaped the basin that pinned naive).

hypotheses.prediction: G1: naive-blocking seeds are basin-locked (high naive_basin_lock_fraction) while VP-resolving seeds have left the basin (low vp_basin_lock_fraction) AND spread over MULTIPLE distinct non-magic prefixes (vp_value_modality >= 3). The direct-literal alternative predicts the opposite signature: VP seeds CONVERGING on ONE target value (low modality, ~uni-modal). This is the decisive separator from a fixed-target gradient: basin escape is divergence-AWAY-from-one-value (multi-modal), literal gradient is convergence-TOWARD-one-value (uni-modal).

hypotheses_tried: vp_structural_assembly_gradient (struct_size_ratio on harfbuzz_5708_h0 derived kern fields)
vp_basin_escape (value_distance away from corpus_dominant_basin, multi-modal, on bloaty_11)
round_0.outcome: ALL refuted (rule_not_met) across the 8 scorable branches; several branches had all three rules score-and-fail.

round_1_2.outcome: Declared the unlabeled set decidable:false; vp_basin_escape later RESTORED (sB monotonic-superset) when it validated bloaty_147/lcms_2147/lcms_2417 via the canonical value_distance fallback.

round_3.outcome: Re-examined the two built tools never tried in this shape (depth_reach, joint_necessity/token_count) and CONFIRMED neither discriminates. No new mechanism added; G3 convergence held. See why_no_new_hypothesis below.

why_no_new_hypothesis.depth_reach_REJECTED: depth_reach (seed_set:depth_reach:branch_line:per_branch) measures per-seed-normalized execution count of the branch line + blocked-side count (winner-resolving vs loser-blocking), the ctx/ngram ITERATION-DEPTH tool. It was untried in this shape, so it is a genuinely new measurement (not a relaxed re-test). But it is NON-INDEPENDENT (G2) for every branch here. For the value-match branches (bloaty/150, libxml2/6325_h1, harfbuzz/6006, harfbuzz/6061_h1, sqlite3/14793) winner_deeper / side_lift just restates 'the winner takes the true side because it contains the value' = the resolve pattern. For the two structural/iterative branches that could in principle differ: (a) libxml2/6655 - the card shows the naive-BLOCKING seeds DO reach the comparison (L6524 L = T:0 / F:28, they hit the line 28x on the false side), so loser_depth is not ~0; both arms reach the line and the only differentiator left is side_lift (true-side count) = the resolve pattern; (b) harfbuzz/5708_h0 - line 187 (!hb_ot_layout_has_machine_kerning) sits on the shaping path that runs for ANY font that loads, so 0x20-padded naive seeds still reach it; depth_lift collapses to side_lift = resolve pattern. In neither structural case does the loser fail to ARRIVE at the line (which is the only way depth_lift would carry signal beyond the resolve pattern). So depth_reach is circular (G2) here.
why_no_new_hypothesis.joint_necessity_token_count_REJECTED: joint_necessity (seed_set:struct_size_and_token_count:tokens:per_branch) compares the vpc-RESOLVING vs cmplog-BLOCKING vs value_profile-BLOCKING seed sets (the vpc-needs-both assembly-depth subtype). In THIS shape vpc is NON-DECISIVE (the '_' in _,W,_,L) - there is no vpc-resolving arm and value_profile is the RESOLVER not a blocker, so the tool's premise (vpc assembles beyond what single techniques reach) does not exist. The token_count metric on a VP-vs-naive contrast would just count whether the resolving seed contains the SQL keyword / structural token it needs to resolve = circular (G2), and an I2S alternative predicts the identical token presence (non-discriminating, G1). Inapplicable.
why_no_new_hypothesis.byte_freq_ratio_operand_enrichment_REJEC: (re-affirmed from round 1) operand_enrichment (corpus_queue:byte_freq_ratio:target_vs_decoy) computes a CMPLOG-vs-naive enrichment. cmplog is NON-DECISIVE here and the label_source says I2S substitution is neither necessary nor sufficient, so a cmplog corpus has no expected gate-target enrichment and would measure the wrong fuzzer. Repurposing the same descriptor VP-vs-naive is (a) NON-INDEPENDENT (G2): a VP-RESOLVING seed by definition carries the operand at the gate offset, so 'VP corpus enriched in the operand vs the naive blocking corpus' verifies the resolve pattern with itself; (b) NON-DISCRIMINATING (G1): an I2S-substitution alternative predicts the IDENTICAL enrichment. Same circular signal as round-0's refuted value_distance, at coarser resolution.
why_no_new_hypothesis.value_distance_match_gates_REJECTED: value_distance_reached toward the fixed gate literal (lcms nmcl, 0xD800, 0x093x, 0x0B05, '?' byte, SQL token) was tried in round 0 and refuted for the 8 unlabeled branches. The cards explain why it cannot work as an independent test: the VP-resolving seeds already CONTAIN the exact operand (vp_min_distance ~ 0 only because a resolving seed contains the answer - circular), while the naive-BLOCKING seeds sit at a DIFFERENT VALID dispatch value (mntr instead of nmcl; a non-vowel codepoint; punctuation), NOT a measurable mid-gradient near-miss. The intermediate near-miss inputs that VP retained and naive discarded - the only thing that would reveal the gradient - are in NEITHER terminal seed set. Re-running with a relaxed threshold is forbidden and would not change this.
why_no_new_hypothesis.struct_size_exhausted: harfbuzz_5708_h0 (derived kern offset/length, operand_literal null) is the ONLY branch whose discriminator is not pure operand-containment circularity. Round-0's vp_structural_assembly_gradient already measured it (struct_size_ratio, reusing joint_necessity's size metric) and it refuted. The branch's own analysis weakest_evidence_point concedes the CMP_MAP distance attribution 'is not directly observable in the prompt' - i.e. the structural-validity signal is inferred, not measured in the terminal corpus. No sharper untried framing exists in the signature.

data_realities_respected: value_profile (CMP_MAP) is a FEEDBACK, not a mutator, and is invisible in mutation_op - its effect is a search-trajectory property; no seed_lineage 'gradient event' is measurable, and the terminal seed-set tools (byte-distance, struct-size, depth, token-count) cannot recover the retained near-miss intermediates that constitute the gradient.
I2S is untagged in mutation_op and cmplog is NON-DECISIVE here, so operand_enrichment (the cmplog-vs-naive byte_freq_ratio tool) is irrelevant to verifying the VP mechanism of this shape.
joint_necessity requires a vpc-RESOLVING arm; vpc is non-decisive ('_') in this shape, so the assembly-depth / token_count contrast has no arm to compute.

harfbuzz_5708_h0 is a structural-assembly gate with different-sized winning vs blocking seeds, so byte-alignment (byte_freq_ratio / fixed-operand distance) is FORBIDDEN there - leaving only struct_size_ratio, which round-0 already tried and which refuted.

on-disk corpora exist only for harfbuzz + sqlite3 on s4 / bloaty,lcms,libxml2 on sB; cross-server, the owning server arbitrates its own targets. The binding constraint here is discriminability, not corpus access.

branch_disposition.note: All 12 branches carry the same real mechanism (VP CMP_MAP distance-bucket gradient that naive lacks), taken from the Layer-1 resolve pattern (label_source). That label STANDS as the analytic shape assignment. vp_basin_escape's value_distance fallback independently confirmed 3 of them on sB. For the remaining 8, what is decidable:false is the INDEPENDENT real-data VERIFICATION (G2): no built tool (incl. the two re-checked this round) produces a signal that confirms this mechanism without re-reading the resolve pattern itself.

notes.verdict: PARTIAL decidable: 1 confirmed hypothesis (vp_basin_escape, 3 branches), 8 branches honestly decidable:false. This is the canonical G3 case - the mechanism is genuine but leaves no terminal-corpus fingerprint independent of the circular 'a resolving seed contains/reaches the answer'. Round 3 re-checked the two never-tried built tools (depth_reach, joint_necessity/token_count) and both are circular or inapplicable here. Inventing a forced label would be the chase-100% / multiple-comparisons failure mode the design forbids.
notes.round_3_reexamination: depth_reach was the strongest new candidate (untried, a different measurement than the refuted struct_size). It fails G2 because on both structural branches (libxml2/6655, harfbuzz/5708) the loser-blocking seeds still ARRIVE at the branch line (libxml2/6655 hits it 28x on the false side; harfbuzz/5708's line is on the always-run shaping path), so depth_lift degenerates to side_lift = the resolve pattern. joint_necessity has no vpc-resolving arm in a _,W,_,L shape.
notes.what_would_change_this: A NEW measurement SOURCE capturing the search TRAJECTORY rather than the terminal corpus - e.g. a corpus-admission timeline (seed save times + parent operand-distance, showing VP saved a monotone sequence of decreasing-residual near-misses while naive saved none). That is a coverage_timeseries / seed_lineage-with-distance descriptor that is NOT built and is gated by data_realities (CMP_MAP admission is not lineage-tagged). Until such a tool exists, these 8 branches stay decidable:false rather than mislabeled.

monotonic_superset_restorations.reason: carried forward verbatim from round 2; validated 3 sB branches via the arbiter's canonical value_distance fallback (winner_closer AND distance_gap>=0.15). Monotonic-superset invariant: KEEP unchanged so the confirmed branches re-validate.
